urdu transliteration text:
MILAD UN NABI
FASLON KO TAKALLUF

english translation text:
Faslon ko takalluf hai hum se agarIf distances prove themselves to be pretentious towards us
Ham bhi bebas nahin, besahara nahinWe are neither helpless, nor are we without support

urdu transliteration text: Raaste mein agar paun thak jaaengeShould our feet grow weary along the path
english translation text: Khud unhin ko pukarenge hum dur se, We shall entreat Him ourselves,

urdu transliteration text:
Jaise hi sabz gumbad nazar aaegaThe moment the green dome becomes visible
Bandagi ka qarina badal jaaegaSlave hood shall manifest itself differently

english translation text:
Sar jhukane ki fursat milegi kiseWho will have respite to bow their heads
Khud hi aankhon se sajde tapak jaaengeProstrations, of their own accord, shall trickle from the very eyes

Hum madine mein tanha nikal jaaengeWe will go out in Madina, bereft of familiar company
Aur galiyon mein qasdan bhatak jaaengeAnd deliberately lose our way in its streets

Hum vahaan jaake vaapas nahin aaengeHaving reached there, we shall not return
Dhundte dhundte log thak jaaengeBe it that looking for us, people grow weary

Naam unka jahaan bhi liya jaaegaHis name, where so ever it shall be mentioned
Zikr unka jahaan bhi kiya jaaegaHis remembrance, where so ever it shall be made

urdu transliteration text: Saari mehfil mein jalve lapak jaaengeSpiritual manifestations shall leap out upon the entire gathering
english translation text: Nur hi nur sinon mein bhar jaaegaLight, and yet more light, shall fill up the souls of those gathered
